title: Spicy Tibs Stir-Fry
description: A classic Ethiopian-style stir-fry made with spicy tibs and crunchy vegetables. Serve over a bed of steamed rice for a flavorful and filling meal.

ingredients.name: Citrusy Cho
ingredients.notes: Chopped citrus-marinated cho (such as bell peppers)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the tibs and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the pak and citrusy cho and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the Ethiopian spice blend and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
Serve over steamed rice for a filling meal.
